channel.title: Slider component giving 503 error
channel.description: Yes fixed error was quote marks thanks guys Yup site is under construction as i am having some delays due to slider and styling when i am adding pre build slider component its working fine on local site but when we build it on live site its start giving 503 error This is the slider which i am using: https://eb1.it/react-animated-slider/

item.title: Slider component giving 503 error
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @inshaal

Could this be the same problem you had here?

Manual install method node cpanel? 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Inverted Comma is the issue: The issue lies here in this line of code as he copied code from @pingram3541’s guide and i think he accidentally places inverted commas instead of single/double quotes: var http = require(‘http’); Replacing this will resolve the issue if 11 steps worked fine: var http = require('http'); OR var http = require("http");

It might just be worth checking the code again for similar syntax errors.

Read full topic

item.title: Slider component giving 503 error
item.dc:creator: inshaal
item.description:
Yes fixed error was quote marks thanks guys
Yup site is under construction
as i am having some delays due to slider and styling
when i am adding pre build slider component its working fine on local site but when we build it on live site its start giving 503 error
This is the slider which i am using: https://eb1.it/react-animated-slider/

Read full topic
